title: clinopodium pachyphyllum
intro: Clinopodium pachyphyllum, also known as the Ecuadoran Clinopodium, is a plant species belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae) native to Ecuador. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Clinopodium pachyphyllum include its potential to aid in digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Clinopodium pachyphyllum can be prepared as a tea or infusion, and its essential oil can be extracted for use in aromatherapy and topical applications.
